currentRole.title: Associate Director in Analytics & Modeling
currentRole.summary: Quantitative analytics and modeling lead working across credit risk, climate risk, predictive ML, and AI-driven decision systems, including production-grade SaaS solutions and orchestrated LLM workflows.

experience.title: Associate Director in Analytics & Modeling
highlights: Built an AI-native intelligence platform that turns outputs from multiple SaaS products into credit risk insights via an orchestrated LLM-agent pipeline.
Led development of predictive ML frameworks for insurance claims and firm size metrics for major banks and insurers.
Led research and implementation of new functionality for a simulation-based SaaS credit risk solution, including valuation, correlation, and impairment capabilities.
Built a firm-level climate risk framework for climate-adjusted PDs and financials deployed in a product used by 40+ clients.
Developed a portfolio-level simulation-based correlation model for geospatial physical climate risk.
Led cross-functional agile squads, supported client onboarding, mentored team members, and drove project planning and execution.

experience.title: Senior Associate in Valuation & Financial Modeling
highlights: Built complex financial models for M&A, litigation, budgeting, restructuring, and public-private partnership tenders across CEE and Western Europe.
Supported valuation, transaction, and strategic decision-making across steel, transportation, energy, real estate, private equity, and financial services.
Conducted financial analysis, market research, valuation, and day-to-day client communication.

experience.title: Quality Assurance Analyst
highlights: Managed payment processing, quality assurance, and payables controls.
Collaborated daily with teams in Czechia, Canada, and Thailand.
Led process improvement and automation initiatives.

standardAnswers.willingToRelocate: Yes. I am currently based in Prague, Czech Republic, and will be relocating to Copenhagen in August 2026 on a permanent basis.
standardAnswers.whyInterestedGeneric: I am most interested in roles that combine quantitative depth, hands-on implementation, and direct decision impact. The strongest fit for me is work where I can build models or analytics end to end, collaborate closely with technical and business stakeholders, and improve real decisions in areas such as risk, climate, machine learning, or applied AI.
